cases.goal: review this python function and suggest a safer fix
inspect README.md and finish after summarizing it

env.ORCHESTRO_SUBPROCESS_COMMAND: bash -lc 'if printf "%s" "$ORCHESTRO_PROMPT_CONTEXT" | grep -q "Tool step"; then if printf "%s" "$ORCHESTRO_PROMPT_CONTEXT" | grep -q "Quickstart"; then printf "{\"action\":\"final\",\"content\":\"reviewed README\"}"; else printf "{\"action\":\"final\",\"content\":\"missing README context\"}"; fi; else printf "{\"action\":\"tool\",\"tool\":\"read_file\",\"argument\":\"README.md\"}"; fi'

cases.goal: make a small coding change in local state and finish

env.ORCHESTRO_SUBPROCESS_COMMAND: bash -lc 'if printf "%s" "$ORCHESTRO_PROMPT_CONTEXT" | grep -q "Tool step 1"; then printf "{\"action\":\"final\",\"content\":\"edited local state\"}"; else printf "{\"action\":\"tool\",\"tool\":\"bash\",\"argument\":\"mkdir -p .orchestro && printf coding-bench > .orchestro/bench-coding-edit.txt\"}"; fi'
